user_query: Where did John and Samantha decide to live together on 31 October, 2022?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "John")]/Session[atom(content =~ "live together")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "decide to live") and atom(content =~ "31 October 2022")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "John")]/Session[atom(content =~ "live together")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "decide to live") and atom(content =~ "31 October 2022")]
